Action: Issuer exposes OID4VCI metadata endpoint; Application retrieves well-known credential issuer information
Data:
- GET request to .well-known/openid-credential-issuer endpoint
- Issuer service instance
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with IssuerMetadata object

Action: Validate issuer metadata structure and contents
Data:
- IssuerMetadata containing: issuerURI, display, supportedCredentialConfigurations
- Credential configuration: university_example_sd_jwt
Expected Result: issuerURI starts with 'http://default-issuer-url.admin.ch'; display is not null; supportedCredentialConfigurations is not null

Action: Verify that SD-JWT credential configuration is supported and exposed
Expected Result: university_example_sd_jwt configuration is present and not null
